calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-21-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
David G. Mendez, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Charles M. Tracey
William Kulick, defendant in pro per

The parties reached a settlement as follows: Judgment in favor of plaintiff Charles M. Tracey and against defendant William Kulick in the amount of $3241.00. Writ to issue immediately for property located at 516 O'Farrell St., #510, S.F., CA. unless defendant delivers to plaintiff the sum of $700.00 by 5:00 p.m. of this date. Defendant to deliver $180.00 by this Sunday June 27, 2004. Defendant agrees to make periodic payments of $700.00 on the 21st of each month until judgment has been satisfied. When satisfied, plaintiff to file satisfaction of judgment. Failure to comply will be an immediate eviction and writ to issue. Each side to bear own costs.

Judge Dondero; Clerks: D. Boffi & V. Mu; Reporter: Jo Ann Bryce, #3321 (206)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Apopearances: No appearance by plaintiff Charles M. Tracey; defendant William Kulick in pro per is present. No settlement conference held because of non-appearance of plaintiff. Judge pro tem Tiela Chalmers; Clerk Craig Blackstone; not reported (218)
